codeReview.summary: Extraction of CSS Responsive and Web APIs is complete and accurate. All required concepts are covered with comprehensive coverage from lecture-content.html and mega-question-bank.js.

VAL-CHEAT-012.evidence: Covers viewport meta, media queries, mobile-first, breakpoints, responsive images, rem units, aspect-ratio (18 questions in question bank)

VAL-CHEAT-013.evidence: Covers localStorage, sessionStorage, XMLHttpRequest, cookies, same-origin policy (22 questions in question bank)

sharedStateObservations.observation: coverage-verification.json shows outdated question counts for css-responsive (8 instead of 18) and web-apis (12 instead of 22). This file should be regenerated after content additions.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Commit a343b2a added 10 new css-responsive questions and 10 new web-apis questions, bringing totals to 18 and 22 respectively, but coverage-verification.json still shows the old counts.

summary: Review passed. The extraction for CSS Responsive (Module 13) and Web APIs (Module 14) is complete and accurate. All expected topics per the feature description are covered: media queries, mobile-first, responsive patterns, localStorage, XMLHttpRequest, cookies. Content is well-organized with code examples, reference tables, and flash cards for review. The extraction fulfills both VAL-CHEAT-012 and VAL-CHEAT-013 assertions.
